article_title: Updates to liquor licensing process for private corporations

briefs.title: BC liquor licensing now includes directors/officers in tied house rules and adds Legal Entity Review process
briefs.summary: BC LCRB has expanded tied house rules to include corporate directors and officers, and introduced a new Legal Entity Review process to assess licensee corporate structures via the online portal.
briefs.action_required: Report any tied house associations through the Permanent Change to a Licensee application in the liquor and cannabis licensing portal.
briefs.article_title: Updates to liquor licensing process for private corporations
